hooks.command: uv run --env-file C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks/pyutf8env --project C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks claude-office-hook session_start
uv run --env-file C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks/pyutf8env --project C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks claude-office-hook session_end

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}'   || true ;; esac
uv run --env-file C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks/pyutf8env --project C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks claude-office-hook pre_tool_use
uv run --env-file C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks/pyutf8env --project C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks claude-office-hook post_tool_use
uv run --env-file C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks/pyutf8env --project C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks claude-office-hook user_prompt_submit
uv run --env-file C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks/pyutf8env --project C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks claude-office-hook permission_request
uv run --env-file C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks/pyutf8env --project C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks claude-office-hook notification
uv run --env-file C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks/pyutf8env --project C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks claude-office-hook stop
uv run --env-file C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks/pyutf8env --project C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks claude-office-hook subagent_start
uv run --env-file C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks/pyutf8env --project C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks claude-office-hook subagent_stop
uv run --env-file C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks/pyutf8env --project C:/Claude/trio-office/hooks claude-office-hook pre_compact
